page: Amazon Web Services r6idn.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8375C processor with 8 vCPUs, corresponding to 4 physical cores with hyper-threading, running at a clock speed of 3.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. Local storage is provided via a bundled 474 GB NVMe SSD instance store volume, and baseline network bandwidth is rated at 12 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average performance across most standard compute and memory operations. The instance achieved a Geekbench single-core score of 1673.0 and a multi-core score of 6164.0. Memory bandwidth tests show 414.14 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 57.24 GB/sec for large-block reads. In database operations, the instance processed 7.88 million Redis SET operations per second and scored 3957.99 on the Passmark database test.

While the instance maintains average tiers for general tasks, it exhibits performance limitations in parallel decompression and larger language model execution. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is relatively weak at 32.51 GB/sec, and LLM inference for a medium 7B model drops to a poor 16.18 tokens/sec for prompt processing. Given the high memory density and local NVMe storage, this instance is configured for memory-intensive workloads, database hosting, caching layers, and web serving, rather than heavy multi-threaded decompression or AI inference.
description: Amazon Web Services r6idn.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance utilizing the Nitro hypervisor and an Intel Xeon 8375C processor. It delivers 8 vCPUs, 64.0 GB of DDR4 RAM, and a bundled 474 GB NVMe SSD instance store. Operating at 3.5 GHz, the CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512. Benchmark results place the instance in the average tier for most operations, with a Passmark database score of 3957.99 and 7.88 million Redis SET operations per second. However, performance tradeoffs exist, particularly in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and medium-sized LLM inference, where it scores in the lower percentiles. With its 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio and high-speed local storage, this instance is suited for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, and static web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r6idn.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB DDR4 RAM, and a 474 GB NVMe SSD, delivering balanced database and caching performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r6idn.2xlarge features 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a 474 GB NVMe SSD for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized architecture combining dedicated Intel Xeon processing with high-speed local NVMe storage for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8375C processor with 8 vCPUs and 3.5 GHz clock speed
64.0 GB of DDR4 memory providing an 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio
Bundled 474 GB local NVMe SSD instance store volume
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor optimization
Suited for memory-intensive databases, caching, and static web serving
